ground_truth.main_content:
Data Analytics Certification

TRUSTED BY LEADING GLOBAL BRANDS
Join 75,000+ professionals who have advanced their careers with our certifications, gaining leadership roles and driving success at top companies worldwide

Globally Recognized Accreditation and Prestigious Partnerships – Accreditations That Ensure Your Certification is Respected
SSGI is a PMI Accredited ATP, SHRM Approved Provider, Baldrige Foundation Partner and an Inc 5000 Award Winning Company.

Why SSGI’s Data Analytics Certification Leads the Industry
When it comes to Data Analytics certification, not all are created equal. Don’t settle for generic programs with unnamed instructors.

Feature	SSGI	Generic Providers

Industry Recognition	✔ Baldrige Partner, PMI ATP	✖ Not Widely Recognized

At SSGI, we set ourselves apart with expert-led training by Dr. Barry Shore, a globally recognized expert with 40+ years of experience. Trusted by Fortune 500 companies and integrated into business schools across North America, our certifications ensure high recognition and credibility among employers worldwide.

Why Choose Expert-Led Training Over Generic Programs?
At SSGI, your training is led by Dr. Barry Shore, an award-winning professor with 40+ years of real-world experience. Unlike generic providers with unnamed instructors, SSGI certifications are:
• Trusted by Fortune 500 companies, including Disney and Tesla.
• Integrated into business schools across North America.
• Designed to maximize your career ROI with industry-recognized credentials.
💡 Fact: Employers prefer certifications from expert-led programs. Stand out with SSGI!

Unlock Your Career Potential with Data Analytics Certification
Are you ready to master data analysis and advance your career?
SSGI’s Data Analytics Certification equips you with the tools to:
• Leverage advanced analytical techniques.
• Drive meaningful improvements in your organization.
• Lead successful projects and create a data-driven culture of continuous improvement.

Take the First Step Toward Career Success
Start your journey to leadership and higher pay for only $199 – complete in 1-3 weeks.
Join thousands of professionals who have advanced their careers with SSGI’s expert-led certifications. With lifetime access, no hidden fees, and trusted credentials, your journey starts here!

Enroll Now for $199
Certification recognized by top employers worldwide.

Learn Critical Data Analysis Skills

FROM CERTIFICATION TO SUCCESS: HOW SSGI HELPED HANNAH LAND A HIGH-PAYING TECH JOB
After completing SSGI Lean Six Sigma Certification, Hannah secured a better job in the tech industry with a higher salary. Watch her story to see how this program helped her stand out, gain new opportunities, and advance her career.
Guided by Dr. Barry Shore, an award-winning instructor with over 40 years of industry expertise.

SSGI Data Analytics Certification Makes an Impact

Data Analytics Program Overview

Overview
How it Works: Simple, Fast, and Effective
Earn your Data Analytics certification in just 3 easy steps:
1. Enroll Instantly – Get immediate access to the course and all training materials.
2. Complete Self-Paced Training – Study at your own pace with lifetime access to advanced lessons, case studies, quizzes, and digital flashcards.
3. Pass the Exam and Get Certified – Take the exam when you’re ready and receive your Data Analytics certification and digital badge.

According to the Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS), the number of roles for individuals with skills in Data Analytics is expected to grow by 30 percent over the next seven years, well above average.

SSGI is leading training provider of data analytics. Training is 100% online, self-paced, mobile friendly and hosted on our learning platform. Course material has been designed so that it is easily understood by beginners and those new to the discipline of data analysis. There are no required software applications or additional training materials needed.
The SSGI Data Analytics Certification program will teach you the skills, tools and knowledge required to compete for analytical, data and competitive business related jobs. This program will equip you with knowledge to better collect, analyze and display data as well as deliver better data-driven business decisions.
Course Topics: Descriptive Analytics, Data Visualization, Tableau, Sampling, Hypothesis Testing, A/B Testing, Data Mining, Big Data, SQL introduction, Analysis using r, Co-Occurrence and more.

This Program is Most Suited for:
• Professionals and students looking to learn fundamental data analytical skills and earn recognized data analysis certification.
• Professionals looking to improve their resume and open new opportunities.
• Business Analysts, Marketers, Management and general Business Professionals.

Course Completion Time:
Average completion time: 1 week – 3 weeks
There is no time restriction. You will have lifetime access.

Course Inclusions:
• Full Data Analytics Course
• Accelerated Data Analytics study guide
• Flash cards
• Practice exam

Course Outcomes:
Data Analytics certification from Six Sigma Global Institute will help you stand out from the competition, open new career opportunities and increase your salary. As a Certified Data Analytics Professional, you will be qualified to compete for high-paying business related jobs and open up new employment opportunities. Our organization trains and certifies employees from top companies around the world such as Amazon, Deloitte, Disney, and Tesla.
• Learn critical analysis and data processing skills.
• Learn cutting edge data visualization skills.
• Learn how to depict data trends to increase organizational performance.

Certification Outcomes:
• Have your certification hosted on a specific URL with a unique ID License number that can be verified by employers and attached to LinkedIn.
• Become qualified to land Analyst and Analytical roles.
• Improve your resume and open hundreds of new job opportunities.

Certification Details
Certification Exam Details
• 100 questions
• 75% passing score
• Online – 2 hour time limit
• Unlimited attempts
• Take the exam at your own convenience – no time restriction

Why Data Analytics Certification?
Why Data Analytics Certification?
“Top Google execs say this skill is one every young professional should know.” – CNBC

Enroll/Fee
Enrollment Fee
Fee: $199
Enrollment includes training and certification/exam.

$199 - Enroll Now

Learn from an Industry-Leading Expert and Take Your Career to the Next Level
Gain access to world-class training from Dr. Barry Shore, a McGraw-Hill award-winning author and global expert in operations management. With over 40 years of experience, Dr. Shore has helped professionals at top companies like General Electric, Hewlett-Packard, and the U.S. Navy lead successful projects and implement impactful improvements.
Dr. Shore’s teaching has empowered professionals at organizations such as Westinghouse, Chase Manhattan Bank, and Deutsche Telekom. As the Chief Learning Officer at SSGI, he has certified over 100,000 professionals, ensuring your Green Belt training prepares you to take on leadership roles and advance your career.
Embark on your Lean Six Sigma journey with SSGI and get Dr. Shore’s signed approval on your resume!
Prof. Barry Shore, PhD | SSGI Founder

You Will Receive an Official Data Analytics Certification
~ Upon Passing the Certification Exam which is Included in your Purchase ~
Shareable on LinkedIn

WHAT YOU’LL ACHIEVE WITH YOUR DATA ANALYTICS CERTIFICATION
By the end of this program, you’ll be ready to:
• Analyze Complex Data for Business Insights
Develop the skills to extract, interpret, and present data-driven insights that drive strategic decision-making across your organization.
• Establish Yourself as a Data-Driven Professional
Gain recognition as an expert who leverages advanced analytics techniques to identify opportunities and solve critical business challenges.
• Advance Your Career with In-Demand Skills
Unlock new opportunities in data analytics, positioning yourself for roles in data science, business intelligence, and beyond.
• Strengthen Your Resume with Industry-Recognized Credentials
Showcase your Data Analytics Certification to demonstrate expertise in analytics tools, statistical methods, and real-world applications.
• Collaborate Effectively Across Teams and Departments
Communicate complex data insights clearly, enabling teams to make informed decisions and achieve organizational goals.

Advance Your Career Now - Enroll Now
